title: Fabric Holiday Pack
description: A collection of Fabric 1.21.4 mods, made for the Fabric Holiday Server.
body:
In 2024, the Fabric server started up a small SMP with a collection of the mods their community made for 1.21.4. As this pack did not include many popular clientside mods like Sodium, Mod Menu, and Iris, this is a expanded version of that pack with additional mods.

As the server has concluded, the mod list is finalized.

## Mods
Italicized mods are clientside and exclusive to this expanded version, bolded mods are made by members of the Fabric Discord.

- [**Alivent Messenger by A11v1r15**](https://modrinth.com/mod/alivent-messager)
- [AppleSkin by squeek502](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- **[Armor Stand Editor by Patbox](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorstandeditor)**
- [*Chat Heads by dzwdz*](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [**ClickThrough+ by cassiancc**](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough+)
- [*ClientSort by NotRyken*](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort)
- [Cloth Config API by shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
